label:
采集汇编效果
Harvest Compendium Effects

Effect: Dust of Lifeguarding (Greater).name: 效果：救生粉尘（强效） Effect: Dust of Lifeguarding (Greater)
Effect: Dust of Lifeguarding (Greater).description:
由 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-equipment.Item.5gh9EGpeRTFaw5VR]{救生防护之尘（强效）}赋予

使用此尘后，你在对抗死亡效果、毒药与疾病时获得+5物品加值。

Granted by @UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-equipment.Item.5gh9EGpeRTFaw5VR]{Dust of Lifeguarding (Greater)}

After using this dust, you gain a +5 item bonus against death effects, poison, and disease.

Effect: Cloak of Flying.name: 效果：飞行斗篷 Effect: Cloak of Flying
Effect: Cloak of Flying.description:
由 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-equipment.um7saAjjztSlDF2O]{飞行斗篷} 授予

你获得30英尺的飞行速度。

Granted by @UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-equipment.um7saAjjztSlDF2O]{Cloak of Flying}

You gain a fly Speed of 30 feet.

Effect: Bloody Talon.name: 效果：血色利爪 Effect: Bloody Talon
Effect: Bloody Talon.description:
由 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-equipment.4p6DH2DydTuQcYmh]{Bloody Talon} 授予

你对该生物额外造成 1d4 持续流血伤害。

Granted by @UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-equipment.4p6DH2DydTuQcYmh]{Bloody Talon}

You deal an additional 1d4 persistent bleed damage to the creature.

Effect: Devil Hide (Greater).name: 效果：魔鬼皮革（高等） Effect: Devil Hide (Greater)
Effect: Devil Hide (Greater).description:
你获得10点火焰与物理伤害抗力。

You gain resistance 10 to fire and physical damage.

Effect: Oil of Fire Coating.name: 效果：火焰油涂层 Effect: Oil of Fire Coating
Effect: Oil of Fire Coating.description:
由 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-equipment.Item.5hNynp5xDp0Z1AFB]{火焰涂层油}赋予

你选择的武器或弹药在命中时额外造成 1d6 火焰伤害。

Granted by @UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-equipment.Item.5hNynp5xDp0Z1AFB]{Oil of Fire Coating}

Your chosen weapon or ammunition deals an additional 1d6 fire damage on a hit.

Effect: Guardian Naga Scales.name: 效果：守护娜迦鳞片 Effect: Guardian Naga Scales
Effect: Guardian Naga Scales.description:
由 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-equipment.Item.yj4otpUbZoCxzi9e]{守护娜迦鳞片} 给予

你的反制检定获得+2物品加值。

Granted by @UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-equipment.Item.yj4otpUbZoCxzi9e]{Guardian Naga Scales}

You gain a +2 item bonus to your counteract check.

Effect: Cloak of Reactive Resistance.name: 效果：反应式抗力斗篷 Effect: Cloak of Reactive Resistance
Effect: Cloak of Reactive Resistance.description:
由 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-equipment.SZa5q9ZpMTSz3VK6]{反应抗力斗篷} 授予

你受到的伤害类型与你采集这些翅膀所来自的巨龙类型相同。

 

Granted by @UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-equipment.SZa5q9ZpMTSz3VK6]{Cloak of Reactive Resistance}

You take damage matching the type of dragon the wings were harvested from.

Effect: Helm of Command.name: 效果：命令头盔 Effect: Helm of Command
Effect: Helm of Command.description:
由 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-equipment.uFohi5Q0TSOjXAAZ]{命令头盔} 授予

你在攻击掷骰、伤害掷骰、AC、豁免以及技能检定上获得+1环境加值。

Granted by @UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-equipment.uFohi5Q0TSOjXAAZ]{Helm of Command}

You gain a +1 circumstance bonus to attack rolls, damage rolls, AC, saves, and skill checks.

Effect: Arboreal Bark Strips.name: 效果：树皮剥落 Effect: Arboreal Bark Strips
Effect: Arboreal Bark Strips.description:
由 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-equipment.Item.ScWID2wz9LXnxjgn]{Arboreal Strips} 授予

你的法术额外造成1个火焰伤害骰。

Granted by @UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-equipment.Item.ScWID2wz9LXnxjgn]{Arboreal Strips}

Your spell deals one additional die of fire damage.

Effect: Roper Eye.name: 效果：罗珀之眼 Effect: Roper Eye
Effect: Roper Eye.description:
由 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-equipment.Item.hbS9SqrE52lyAFe4]{攫索魔眼} 授予

你获得黑暗视觉。

Granted by @UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-equipment.Item.hbS9SqrE52lyAFe4]{Roper Eye}

You gain darkvision.

Effect: Fire Immunity Ash.name: 效果：火焰免疫 灰烬 Effect: Fire Immunity Ash
Effect: Fire Immunity Ash.description:
由 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-equipment.Item.azStKOnwX6cI0SPI]{巴洛炎魔灰烬}，@UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-equipment.Item.9XpUi6KGp769axsA]{凤凰灰烬} 授予

你免疫火焰伤害。

Granted by @UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-equipment.Item.azStKOnwX6cI0SPI]{Balor Ash}, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-equipment.Item.9XpUi6KGp769axsA]{Phoenix Ash}

You are immune to fire damage.

Effect: Pouches of Filth.name: 效果：污秽小袋 Effect: Pouches of Filth
Effect: Pouches of Filth.description:
由 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-equipment.LcJ4kaVnkQB599An]{污秽袋} 赋予

你在该豁免检定上获得–2环境减值。

Granted by @UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-equipment.LcJ4kaVnkQB599An]{Pouches of Filth}

You gain a –2 circumstance penalty on the saving throw.

Effect: Sylvan Wineskin.name: 效果：木族酒囊 Effect: Sylvan Wineskin
Effect: Sylvan Wineskin.description:
由 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-equipment.Item.FaceljPJixTOC3bM]{林语酒囊} 给予

你获得 +1 物品加值于意志豁免。对抗恐惧效果时，该加值提高至 +2。

Granted by @UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-equipment.Item.FaceljPJixTOC3bM]{Sylvan Wineskin}

You gain a +1 item bonus to Will saves. This bonus is increased to +2 against fear effects.

Effect: Creation Oil.name: 效果：造物油 Effect: Creation Oil
Effect: Creation Oil.description:
由 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-equipment.fu3zIfaFngHZkSYi]{造物油} 授予

你的弹药额外造成 1d6 活力伤害。

Granted by @UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-equipment.fu3zIfaFngHZkSYi]{Creation Oil}

Your ammunition deals an additional 1d6 vitality damage.

Effect: Baomal Shellplate Armor.name: 效果：巴奥玛尔壳板护甲 Effect: Baomal Shellplate Armor
Effect: Baomal Shellplate Armor.description:
由 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-equipment.JPMN64sOZA7MuUVX]{宝马尔贝壳板甲护甲} 授予

你的护甲所赋予的物理抗力在对抗触发的伤害时提升至15。

Granted by @UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-equipment.JPMN64sOZA7MuUVX]{Baomal Shellplate Armor}

The physical resistance granted by your armor increases to 15 against the triggering damage.

Effect: Shifter Solution.name: 效果：变形者的解决方案 Effect: Shifter Solution
Effect: Shifter Solution.description:
由 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-equipment.xmqGdYZM4BZwVie2]{Shifter Solution} 授予

你获得欺瞒检定+1物品加值，以及用于伪装的检定+2物品加值。

Granted by @UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-equipment.xmqGdYZM4BZwVie2]{Shifter Solution}

You gain a +1 item bonus to Deception checks, and a +2 item bonus to checks made to Impersonate.

Effect: Additional Fire Damage.name: 效果：额外火焰伤害 Effect: Additional Fire Damage
Effect: Additional Fire Damage.description:
你造成额外 1d6 火焰伤害。

You deal an additional 1d6 fire damage.

Effect: Bunyip Scent Gland.name: 效果：邦伊普嗅腺 Effect: Bunyip Scent Gland
Effect: Bunyip Scent Gland.description:
由 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-equipment.Item.LoM6gw9NSJar3WgQ]{Bunyip Scent Gland} 授予

你获得嗅觉，作为一种不精确嗅觉，射程为60英尺。

Granted by @UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-equipment.Item.LoM6gw9NSJar3WgQ]{Bunyip Scent Gland}

You gain scent as an imprecise scent to a range of 60 feet.

Effect: Ghost Bane Oil.name: 效果：幽灵（特征）克星油 Effect: Ghost Bane Oil
Effect: Ghost Bane Oil.description:
由 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-equipment.PU9aXqOrdJRc0C3Y]{幽灵克星油} 授予

你的武器或弹药获得幽灵接触符文的效果。

Granted by @UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-equipment.PU9aXqOrdJRc0C3Y]{Ghost Bane Oil}

Your weapon or ammunition gains the effects of a ghost touch rune.

Effect: Skulltaker's Shroud.name: 效果：夺颅者的裹尸布 Effect: Skulltaker's Shroud
Effect: Skulltaker's Shroud.description:
由 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-equipment.hgZxwcr6yp5sSIP7]{夺颅者的裹尸布}授予

你获得10点对穿刺或挥砍伤害的抗力。

 

Granted by @UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-equipment.hgZxwcr6yp5sSIP7]{Skulltaker's Shroud}

You gain resistance 10 to piercing or slashing damage.

Effect: Elemental Core.name: 效果：元素核心 Effect: Elemental Core
Effect: Elemental Core.description:
由 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-equipment.Item.qIjXxIIQqrGvV5tk]{元素核心} 授予

你获得+2环境加值，用于对抗会导致流血、麻痹、毒药或睡眠的效果。

Granted by @UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-equipment.Item.qIjXxIIQqrGvV5tk]{Elemental Core}

You gain +2 circumstance bonus against effects that would cause bleed, paralysis, poison, or sleep.

Effect: Quatoid Hide Strips.name: 效果：夸托伊德皮革条 Effect: Quatoid Hide Strips
Effect: Quatoid Hide Strips.description:
由 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-equipment.Item.n2MRCV1p9Qb55cQ7]{夸托伊德皮革条} 赋予

你在对抗情绪效果的豁免检定上获得+2环境加值。

Granted by @UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-equipment.Item.n2MRCV1p9Qb55cQ7]{Quatoid Hide Strips}

You gain a +2 circumstance bonus to saving throws against emotion effects.

Effect: Simurgh Blood.name: 效果：西穆尔格血液 Effect: Simurgh Blood
Effect: Simurgh Blood.description:
由 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-equipment.Item.lM6E2bgiA4B070aD]{西穆尔格血液} 授予

你获得 15 点火焰伤害抗力，并且你免疫睡眠效果和疾病。

Granted by @UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-equipment.Item.lM6E2bgiA4B070aD]{Simurgh Blood}

You gain resistance 15 to fire damage, and you are immune to sleep effects and to disease.

Effect: Protean Blood.name: 效果：变幻 血液 Effect: Protean Blood
Effect: Protean Blood.description:
由 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-equipment.Item.MvauE1oT6lGqasoY]{异变体血液} 赋予

你获得对酸、闪电或音波伤害的抗力 5。

Granted by @UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-equipment.Item.MvauE1oT6lGqasoY]{Protean Blood}

You gain resistance 5 to acid, electricity, or sonic damage.

Effect: Winter Cloak.name: 效果：冬之斗篷 Effect: Winter Cloak
Effect: Winter Cloak.description:
由 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-equipment.P76bJdzgkzBBSeTH]{冬之斗篷} 授予

你获得寒冷伤害 抗力15。

Granted by @UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-equipment.P76bJdzgkzBBSeTH]{Winter Cloak}

You gain resistance 15 to cold damage.

Effect: Pleroma Energy Cloak.name: 效果：圆满能量披风 Effect: Pleroma Energy Cloak
Effect: Pleroma Energy Cloak.description:
由 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-equipment.ToxC30mrGoXRMJQQ]{Pleroma Energy Cloak} 授予

你获得40尺的飞行速度。

Granted by @UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-equipment.ToxC30mrGoXRMJQQ]{Pleroma Energy Cloak}

You gain a fly Speed of 40 feet.

Effect: Mukradi Rawhide Armor.name: 效果：穆克拉迪生皮护甲 Effect: Mukradi Rawhide Armor
Effect: Mukradi Rawhide Armor.description:
由 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-equipment.BTUyd0Th29Ws8FrH]{穆克拉迪生皮护甲} 赋予

你对所选的伤害类型拥有10点抗力。

Granted by @UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-equipment.BTUyd0Th29Ws8FrH]{Mukradi Rawhide Armor}

You have resistance 10 to the chosen damage type.

Effect: Leshy Spores.name: 效果：莱西孢子 Effect: Leshy Spores
Effect: Leshy Spores.description:
由 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-equipment.Item.dXTQvKGlL1FTA4Ug]{莱西孢子}赋予

你在对抗带有毒素（特征）的法术的豁免检定上承受–2环境减值。

Granted by @UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-equipment.Item.dXTQvKGlL1FTA4Ug]{Leshy Spores}

You take –2 circumstance penalty on saving throws against spells with the poison trait.

Effect: Oil of the Bastion.name: 效果：堡垒之油 Effect: Oil of the Bastion
Effect: Oil of the Bastion.description:
由 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-equipment.Item.CApjx23qLlH0VPx3]{壁垒油} 授予

只要你在本回合尚未移动，你的反射豁免获得+2环境加值。

Granted by @UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-equipment.Item.CApjx23qLlH0VPx3]{Oil of the Bastion}

You gain a +2 circumstance bonus to Reflex saves as long as you have not moved this turn.

Effect: Alghollthu Eyes.name: 效果：阿尔古苏之眼 Effect: Alghollthu Eyes
Effect: Alghollthu Eyes.description:
由 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-equipment.Item.GtsuXaVFIi4YmcM1]{阿尔古苏之眼} 授予

你在对抗法术的豁免检定上承受–2环境减值。

Granted by @UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-equipment.Item.GtsuXaVFIi4YmcM1]{Alghollthu Eyes}

You take a –2 circumstance penalty on your save against a spell.

Effect: Dust of Lifeguarding.name: 效果：救生尘埃 Effect: Dust of Lifeguarding
Effect: Dust of Lifeguarding.description:
由 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-equipment.SyOFseGlGhDD67C1]{救生防护尘} 授予

你获得 +2 物品加值，对抗死亡效果、毒药和疾病。

Granted by @UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-equipment.SyOFseGlGhDD67C1]{Dust of Lifeguarding}

You gain a +2 item bonus against death effects, poison, and disease.

Effect: Mu Spores.name: 效果：穆孢子 Effect: Mu Spores
Effect: Mu Spores.description:
由 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-equipment.Item.LcqjFAfYPjvLq5OH]{木孢子}授予

你对抗法术的反射豁免检定承受 –2 环境减值。

Granted by @UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-equipment.Item.LcqjFAfYPjvLq5OH]{Mu Spores}

You take a –2 circumstance penalty on your Reflex saving throw against a spell.

Effect: Potion of Evil Resistance (Great.name: 效果：邪恶抗力药水（强效） Effect: Potion of Evil Resistance (Greater)
Effect: Potion of Evil Resistance (Great.description:
由 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-equipment.Item.HJYb46XPsKyBdCBi]{邪恶抗力药水（强效）}赋予

你获得15点对不洁伤害的抗力。

Granted by @UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-equipment.Item.HJYb46XPsKyBdCBi]{Potion of Evil Resistance (Greater)}

You gain resistance 15 to unholy damage.

Effect: Wendigo Eyes.name: 效果：温迪戈之眼 Effect: Wendigo Eyes
Effect: Wendigo Eyes.description:
由 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-equipment.Item.ygyGxBDEYqchn24c]{温迪戈之眼} 授予

你获得黑暗视觉。

Granted by @UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-equipment.Item.ygyGxBDEYqchn24c]{Wendigo Eyes}

You gain darkvision.

Effect: Giant's Name Rune.name: 效果：巨人之名符文 Effect: Giant's Name Rune
Effect: Giant's Name Rune.description:
由 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-equipment.4PYWkes88i3j8mme]{巨人铭文符文} 授予

当你启动该符文时，你对该生物造成等同于你力量调整值的额外伤害。

Granted by @UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-equipment.4PYWkes88i3j8mme]{Giant's Name Rune}

When you activate the rune, you deal additional damage to the creature equal to your Strength modifier.

Effect: Mu Spore Teeth.name: 效果：木孢子之牙 Effect: Mu Spore Teeth
Effect: Mu Spore Teeth.description:
由 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-equipment.Item.6oTROXdtKov1LCBU]{木孢子之牙} 赋予

你的打击额外造成 2d6 精确伤害。

Granted by @UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-equipment.Item.6oTROXdtKov1LCBU]{Mu Spore Teeth}

Your Strike deals an additional 2d6 precision damage.

Effect: Potion of Evil Resistance.name: 效果：邪恶抗力药水 Effect: Potion of Evil Resistance
Effect: Potion of Evil Resistance.description:
由 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-equipment.Item.TpxNmOa5zZnN2Tzv]{邪恶抗力药水（次等）} 授予

你获得5点对邪秽伤害的抗力。

Granted by @UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-equipment.Item.TpxNmOa5zZnN2Tzv]{Potion of Evil Resistance (Lesser)}

You gain resistance 5 to unholy damage.

Effect: Protean Blood (Greater).name: 效果：变幻 血液（高等） Effect: Protean Blood (Greater)
Effect: Protean Blood (Greater).description:
由 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-equipment.Item.iUGIVK6UsAfheSxN]{变幻 血液（高等）} 授予

你获得15点酸蚀、电击或音波伤害的抗力。

Granted by @UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-equipment.Item.iUGIVK6UsAfheSxN]{Protean Blood (Greater)}

You gain resistance 15 to acid, electricity, or sonic damage.

Effect: Devil Hide.name: 效果：魔鬼皮革 Effect: Devil Hide
Effect: Devil Hide.description:
由 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-equipment.Item.lQabCippFjTIXlR9]{魔鬼皮革} 授予

你获得火焰伤害与物理伤害抗力 5。

Granted by @UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-equipment.Item.lQabCippFjTIXlR9]{Devil Hide}

You gain resistance 5 to fire and physical damage.

Effect: Naga Tongue.name: 效果：那伽之舌 Effect: Naga Tongue
Effect: Naga Tongue.description:
由 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-equipment.Item.CdWTetFh5HlWKUd7]{Naga Tongue} 授予

你在欺瞒、交涉与威吓检定中获得+1状态加值。

Granted by @UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-equipment.Item.CdWTetFh5HlWKUd7]{Naga Tongue}

You gain a +1 status bonus to Deception, Diplomacy, and Intimidation checks.

Effect: Alicorn Staff.name: 效果：独角兽法杖 Effect: Alicorn Staff
Effect: Alicorn Staff.description:
由 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-equipment.1h3qJmYwJtO33Tzm]{独角兽法杖} 给予

你所选择的武器获得幽灵接触属性符文的效果。

Granted by @UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-equipment.1h3qJmYwJtO33Tzm]{Alicorn Staff}

Your chosen weapon gains the effects of the ghost touch property rune.

Effect: Curse-Breaker Claws.name: 效果：破咒者之爪 Effect: Curse-Breaker Claws
Effect: Curse-Breaker Claws.description:
由 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-equipment.Item.Hsn6UkpoR7dBmf5z]{破咒之爪}赋予

你获得对抗诅咒效果的+5物品加值。若使用该爪使你在对抗该诅咒的豁免中成功，你会承受一些惩罚（见下表）。若你大成功，则不承受任何惩罚。

诅咒等级效果
1-4你受到 @Damage[1d6[mental]] 伤害
5-9你受到 @Damage[2d6[mental]] 伤害。你获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{笨拙 1}，持续1小时。
10-14你受到 @Damage[4d6[mental]] 伤害。你获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{笨拙 2}，持续1小时，且你获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.yblD8fOR1J8rDwEQ]{困惑}
15+你受到 @Damage[6d6[mental]] 伤害。你获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{笨拙 3}，持续1小时，且你处于困惑。

Granted by @UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-equipment.Item.Hsn6UkpoR7dBmf5z]{Curse-Breaker Claws}

You gain a +5 item bonus against the effects of the curse. If using the claw causes you to succeed on the save against the curse, you suffer some penalties (see table below). If you critically succeed, you suffer no penalties.

Curse LevelEffects
1-4You take @Damage[1d6[mental]] damage
5-9You take @Damage[2d6[mental]] damage. You are @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{Clumsy 1} for 1 hour.
10-14You take @Damage[4d6[mental]] damage. You are @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{Clumsy 2} for 1 hour, and you are @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.yblD8fOR1J8rDwEQ]{Confused}
15+You take @Damage[6d6[mental]] damage. You are @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{Clumsy 3} for 1 hour, and you are Confused.

Effect: Helm of Death Protection.name: 效果：死亡防护头盔 Effect: Helm of Death Protection
Effect: Helm of Death Protection.description:
由 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-equipment.Item.JKDQng8JUYE49O2R]{死亡防护头盔} 赋予

你获得对死亡效果的免疫。

Granted by @UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-equipment.Item.JKDQng8JUYE49O2R]{Helm of Death Protection}

You gain immunity to death effects.

Effect: Potion of Evil Resistance (Moder.name: 效果：邪恶抗力药水（中等） Effect: Potion of Evil Resistance (Moderate)
Effect: Potion of Evil Resistance (Moder.description:
由 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-equipment.Item.ByMP8U2MYs2H1Eud]{中等邪恶抗力药水} 赋予

你获得对亵渎伤害的10点抗力。

Granted by @UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-equipment.Item.ByMP8U2MYs2H1Eud]{Potion of Evil Resistance (Moderate)}

You gain resistance 10 to unholy damage.

Effect: Mantis Mandibles.name: 效果：螳螂颚钳 Effect: Mantis Mandibles
Effect: Mantis Mandibles.description:
由 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-equipment.Item.LVXvnFCq6HX52UBZ]{螳螂颚} 授予

在战斗的第一轮中，尚未行动的生物对你处于措手不及状态。

Granted by @UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-equipment.Item.LVXvnFCq6HX52UBZ]{Mantis Mandibles}

During the first round of combat, creatures that haven't acted yet are off-guard to you.

Effect: Oil of Evil Coating.name: 效果：邪恶涂层油 Effect: Oil of Evil Coating
Effect: Oil of Evil Coating.description:
由 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-equipment.Item.tcy8xmXlo3bUtHhT]{邪恶涂层油} 授予

你选择的武器在命中时额外造成 1d6 点不洁灵魂伤害。

Granted by @UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-equipment.Item.tcy8xmXlo3bUtHhT]{Oil of Evil Coating}

Your chosen weapon deals an additional 1d6 unholy spirit damage on a hit.

Effect: Vampire Blood.name: 效果：吸血鬼（特征）血液 Effect: Vampire Blood
Effect: Vampire Blood.description:
由 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-equipment.Item.13p9mnowalhs9UaD]{吸血鬼（特征）血液} 授予

你获得快速治疗 5。

注意：此效果的持续时间被实现为 [[/r 2d3]] 的结果与 6 轮取最大值。若你掷骰结果更低，你必须手动编辑此效果的持续时间。

Granted by @UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-equipment.Item.13p9mnowalhs9UaD]{Vampire Blood}

You gain fast healing 5.

Note: The duration of this effect is implemented as the maximum of [[/r 2d3]], 6 rounds. You must edit the duration of this effect manually if you roll lower.

Effect: Ceustodaemon Blood.name: 效果：Ceustodaemon 血液 Effect: Ceustodaemon Blood
Effect: Ceustodaemon Blood.description:
由 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-equipment.Item.lIZObF7HqOBzsfLl]{Ceustodaemon 血液} 赋予

你造成额外 1d6 精确伤害。

Granted by @UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-equipment.Item.lIZObF7HqOBzsfLl]{Ceustodaemon Blood}

You deal an additional 1d6 precision damage.
